\r\n

Privacy Policy

\r\n
\r\n

Effective Date: June 23, 2026

\r\n

Mokau Invest (\"we\", \"our\", or \"us\") values your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and protect your information when you visit our website.

\r\n \r\n

1. Information We Collect

\r\n

We collect information that you voluntarily provide to us when filling out our contact form, including your name, email address, phone number, and any message details.

\r\n \r\n

2. How We Use Your Information

\r\n

We use the collected information to respond to your inquiries, provide support, improve our services, and communicate with you about our startup acceleration and investment programs.

\r\n \r\n

3. Information Sharing

\r\n

We do not sell, trade, or otherwise transfer your personally identifiable information to third parties without your consent, except to trusted service providers who assist us in operating our website or conducting our business, so long as those parties agree to keep this information confidential.

\r\n \r\n

4. Data Security

\r\n

We implement a variety of security measures to maintain the safety of your personal information. However, no method of transmission over the Internet is 100% secure, and we cannot guarantee absolute security.

\r\n \r\n

5. Cookies

\r\n

We may use cookies to understand and save your preferences for future visits and compile aggregate data about site traffic and site interaction so that we can offer better site experiences and tools in the future.

\r\n \r\n

6. Consent

\r\n

By using our website, you consent to our Privacy Policy.

\r\n \r\n

7. Contact Us

\r\n

If you have any questions regarding this Privacy Policy, you may contact us using the contact form on our website.

\r\n
